overview.description: The iShares CMBS ETF (CMBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of investment-grade commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBSs) with an expected life of at least one year. CMBS was launched on Feb 14, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
